_comment: Hook implementations are TODO placeholders in PHASE-0. PHASE-2 replaces the placeholder commands with real implementations under tools/trace/. Declarations here satisfy REQ-ARCH-0008 and ADR-0005 §6.

hooks.command: true # TODO PHASE-2: tools/trace/resume.py — print active phase, in-flight task, last commit, next action
true # TODO PHASE-2: tools/trace/validate_commit.py — reject malformed commit messages, enforce P4 red-before-green
true # TODO PHASE-2: tools/trace/journal_touch.py — append file_touch event

true # TODO PHASE-2: tools/trace/journal_commit.py (on git commit) — append commit event AND push HEAD to origin as FF (ADR-0005 §6 amendment 0001); tools/trace/journal_tests.py (on test runners) — append tests_run event
true # TODO PHASE-2: tools/trace/post_merge_sync.py — git fetch origin; fast-forward working branch to updated upstream; push FF (ADR-0005 §6 amendment 0001)
true # TODO PHASE-2: tools/trace/checkpoint.py — if @{u}..HEAD non-empty, push committed work (ADR-0005 §7 amendment 0001); if working tree dirty, WIP commit + push; append session_end
true # TODO PHASE-2: tools/trace/checkpoint.py (idempotent) — final session_end event
